title: Dexter Phase 2.5 — Hardening Pass Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan to harden existing Phase 1-2 Dexter bot code: surface failures, fix deterministic bugs, and plug resource leaks.
notes: Prose + checkbox task plan with no YAML frontmatter; no Decision/Consequences (not ADR), no user stories/acceptance criteria (not PRD), no API/schema contracts (not SPEC). It is an implementation guide referencing a separate design spec, so classified DOC. Medium confidence: content signals only, one dominant.
